You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a wardrobe, a pillow, a bed, a potion recipe and a book. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the floor. The potion recipe is on the bed. The book is on the bed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
> read potion recipe

You read the potion recipe:
Espeldertatarum potion
Ingredients: Water, red beetle, spiderweb, sandwich.
1. Pour water into your cauldron.
2. Add the red beetle into your cauldron.
3. Wiggle a fairy wand on your cauldron.
4. Wiggle a ice wand over your cauldron.
5. Put the spiderweb into your cauldron.
6. Put the sandwich into your cauldron.
> take book
You take the book. In your inventory you have a book.
> read book
You can't see any text on the book.
> open wardrobe
The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
> go to reading room

I don't know what 'at shelf' means.
> examine shelf
This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
> examine table
This is a table. There is nothing on the table.

You take the bucket of water. In your inventory you have a bucket of water and a book.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a wardrobe, a pillow, a bed, a potion recipe and a book. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the floor. The potion recipe is on the bed. The book is on the bed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
> read potion recipe

You read the potion recipe:
Espeldertatarum potion
Ingredients: Water, red beetle, spiderweb, sandwich.
1. Pour water into your cauldron.
2. Add the red beetle into your cauldron.
3. Wiggle a fairy wand on your cauldron.
4. Wiggle a ice wand over your cauldron.
5. Put the spiderweb into your cauldron.
6. Put the sandwich into your cauldron.
> take book
You take the book. In your inventory you have a book.
> read book
You can't see any text on the book.
> open wardrobe
The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
> go to reading room
You are in a reading room now. There are a chair, a couch, a table, a side table and a shelf. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
> look at shelf
I don't know what 'at shelf' means.
> examine shelf
This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
> examine table
This is a table. There is nothing on the table.
> go to garden

You are in a garden now. There are a nightshade, a bucket of water, a garden bench and a lily of the valley. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. The lily of the valley is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
> take bucket of water
You take the bucket of water. In your inventory you have a bucket of water and a book.
> go to storage room

You are in a storage room now. There are a whisk, a plunkle crystal, a ladle, a plonkle crystal, a borpulus, a spoon, a crate and a plinkle crystal. The whisk is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
> go to hallway
You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a bedroom, a reading room, a magic workshop and a broom closet here.
> go to magic workshop

You are in a magic workshop now. There are a zulpowand, a orrery, a fire wand, a workbench, a ice wand and a fairy wand. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
> take fairy wand
Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
> drop book

You drop the book on the floor.
The book floats up to the ceiling.
> take fairy wand
You take the fairy wand. In your inventory you have a bucket of water and a fairy wand.
> go to kitchen

You are in a kitchen now. There are a counter, a cauldron, a plate and a cupboard. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. There are passages to a pantry and a conservatory here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
